wgtgm-mini-player.welcomePageHTML:
Welcome to Mini Player

Be part of the Mini Player Community

Join us on Discord.

Supporting the development

If you want to support the development, consider taking a look at the membership options on Patreon.

Documentation

Feeling a little lost? Head over to our documentation page for some direction, or jump on Discord and ask a question.

ui.rescanComplete: Mini Player: Music library rescan complete.

runonlyonce.name: Welcome message disabled
runonlyonce.hint: Disable to see the Welcome Message

rememberOpenState.name: Remember the player and soundboard state.
rememberOpenState.hint: Opens the Player and Soundboard on load if they were open when Foundry was closed.

enableCrossfade.name: Enable crossfade
enableCrossfade.hint: If enabled crossfade will be applied to music playlists

enableSoundboardCrossfade.name: Enable crossfade on Soundboard
enableSoundboardCrossfade.hint: If enabled crossfade will be applied to soundboard playlists

crossfadeDuration.name: Crossfade duration (seconds)
crossfadeDuration.hint: Set the length of crossfade between tracks in seconds

maxTrackCount.name: Maximum number of tracks in a Tag Playlist
maxTrackCount.hint: Limits the number of tracks in the tag playlist created dynamically in the Mini Player

musicFolder.name: Base music folder
musicFolder.hint: Folder where playlists are created from, folders with [sfx] will be added as Soundboard Only

includePlaylistSoundsInTagScan.name: Include non-Mini Player playlists in tag scans
includePlaylistSoundsInTagScan.hint: Also scan sounds from playlists that were not created by Mini Player. Duplicate tracks are ignored using each sound path.

setToLoop.name: Set Soundboard Playlist tracks to loop
setToLoop.hint: Imported tracks in Soundboard Only playlists will be set to loop

setToEnvironment.name: Set Soundboard Playlist channel to Environment
setToEnvironment.hint: Imported Soundboard Only playlists will be set to the Environment channel

setMusicToLoop.name: Set Music Playlist tracks to loop
setMusicToLoop.hint: Imported tracks in Music playlists will be set to loop

playOnSelect.name: Play on Track Select
playOnSelect.hint: Automatically play a track when it is selected from the dropdown list.

stopOnNewSoundboard.name: Stop on new Sound
stopOnNewSoundboard.hint: Stop playback of the soundboard track when a new Soundboard sound is played.

stopOnNewPlaylist.name: Stop on New Playlist
stopOnNewPlaylist.hint: Stop playback of the current track when a track from a new playlist is selected.

linkTTRPG.name: Link with TTRPG Music (Patreon)
linkTTRPG.hint: Enable integration with the Tabletop RPG Music module. Requires the module to be installed and active.

dockSidebar.name: Dock to Playlists
dockSidebar.hint: If enabled, the player will be docked to the playlist panel.
